summary: Read the flow plan and improver wiring, then independently exercised `runEcosystemUpdate` and `runReapplySweep` with my own throwaway Node fixture script. Those isolated checks passed, and source inspection confirms both phases are wired before the `IMPROVER_PROJECTS_DIR` branch in `improver.mjs` and before memory/dream logic in `server.mjs`. The real `node fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs run-now` invocation did not pass in this environment: it emitted EPERM errors writing under `~/.garrison` and exited 1, so the requested end-to-end real-home check failed.
steps: exec_command: listed repo context, confirmed `.codegraph/` exists, and located `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `docs/autothing/runs/20260701-092738-9b939e7a/FLOW_PLAN.md`.
exec_command: read `CLAUDE.md` and `docs/autothing/runs/20260701-092738-9b939e7a/FLOW_PLAN.md` for project and feature context.

exec_command: used `codegraph explore "runEcosystemUpdate runReapplySweep improver main doRunNow ecosystem-update reapply-sweep"` and direct file reads to inspect `fittings/seed/improver/lib/ecosystem-update.mjs`, `fittings/seed/improver/lib/reapply-sweep.mjs`, `fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs`, `fittings/seed/improver/scripts/server.mjs`, `fittings/seed/improver/lib/review-queue.mjs`, and `fittings/seed/improver/lib/apply-core.mjs`.

exec_command: used `rg -n` plus `sed` on `fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs` to confirm `main()` calls `runEcosystemUpdate(...)` and `runReapplySweep(...)` before `if (process.env.IMPROVER_PROJECTS_DIR)`, and read `server.mjs` to confirm `doRunNow()` calls both before `computeDream(...)`/`runImprover(...)`.

exec_command: wrote and ran `/private/tmp/improver_feature_verify.mjs`, my own throwaway verifier. It created temp fixtures and directly executed `runEcosystemUpdate` and `runReapplySweep`. Verified `runEcosystemUpdate` called stubbed `runApm` with `['outdated','-v']` then `['install','--update','--force']`, always with `cwd=compositionDir`, never used `-g`/`--global`, appended `ecosystem-update-log.json`, resolved on `{ok:false,...}` and thrown failures, and no-op skipped without calling `runApm` when `apm.yml` was absent.

exec_command: the same throwaway verifier created its own `review-queue.json` fixtures and executed `runReapplySweep`. Verified marker restoration for a clobbered applied entry, byte-for-byte no change when marker already existed, `reapply-failed` with `reapplyFailureReason: 'target file missing'` for a missing target, and identical before/after bytes for a deliberately corrupt invalid-JSON queue file.

exec_command: ran a real end-to-end invocation via `node fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs run-now` while capturing `~/.garrison/improver/ecosystem-update-log.json` and `reapply-sweep-log.json` counts before/after. Observed exit status 1, EPERM console errors writing `~/.garrison/improver/*`, and no new log entries.

failures.expected: Exit code 0 and append one new entry to `~/.garrison/improver/ecosystem-update-log.json` and `~/.garrison/improver/reapply-sweep-log.json`.
failures.actual: Exited with status 1. STDERR showed `EPERM: operation not permitted` opening `~/.garrison/improver/ecosystem-update-log.json`, `~/.garrison/improver/reapply-sweep-log.json`, and creating `~/.garrison/improver/proposals`. No new log entries were written.
